title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows a girl making a cake. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A teenage girl is making a cake in a bright kitchen. She is mixing ingredients in a large bowl on a table. There are eggs, flour, a wooden spoon and some fruit beside her.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people waiting for a bus. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Three people are waiting at a bus stop in a town. One woman is looking at the timetable and two young men are sitting on a bench. There is a road, a bus sign and some shops behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
